summary: AI Incident Narrative Engine - COMPLETE. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED. Frontend: All IncidentNarrative component features verified. GPT-5.2 AI generation working (78% confidence on low_battery incident). Template fallback working (40% confidence on TEST incident). All narrative sections render correctly.

TestNarrativeGeneration.test_generate_narrative_returns_200: PASS - Creates narrative with id, narrative_version, generated_by, confidence
TestNarrativeGeneration.test_generate_narrative_structure: PASS - title, one_line_summary, what_happened, evidence, recommended_actions, confidence
TestNarrativeGeneration.test_cached_response_when_input_unchange: PASS - Returns cached=true when input_hash unchanged
TestNarrativeGeneration.test_generate_404_for_nonexistent_incide: PASS - 404 on POST for non-existent incident

TestNarrativeHistory.test_get_narratives_returns_list: PASS - Returns array with narrative_version, generated_by, confidence, created_at

TestNarrativeVersioning.test_version_increments_on_new_generatio: PASS - Version increments when input_hash changes

TestNarrativeContent.test_narrative_actions_have_priority_and: PASS - priority, action, owner fields present

IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.component_renders: PASS - Component renders in expanded incident row
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.ai_incident_summary_header: PASS - 'AI Incident Summary' header with Brain icon
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.title: PASS - 'Critical Sos Alert on Mob-01'
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.model_badge: PASS - 'Template' badge (not AI generated due to low confidence)
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.what_happened_section: PASS - Bullet points with chronological events
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.contributing_factors: PASS - 'Root cause analysis requires more data'
IncidentNarrative_TEST_incident.safety_note: PASS - Yellow banner for test data warning

IncidentNarrative_low_battery_incident.component_renders: PASS - Component renders in expanded row
IncidentNarrative_low_battery_incident.comprehensive_content: PASS - Full what_happened, contributing_factors, evidence, actions
IncidentNarrative_low_battery_incident.owner_badges: PASS - operator and system owner badges on actions

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/operator/incidents/{id}/narrat: Generate narrative - 200 OK, creates/returns cached narrative
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/incidents/{id}/narrati: Get history - 200 OK, returns list of versions
Check status - 200 OK, returns has_narrative, is_stale, latest_version

critical_code_review_comments: Backend narrative_engine.py correctly implements two-stage generation: facts_pack → AI/template narrative
Backend uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with GPT-5.2 model for AI narrative generation
Backend template fallback works when AI unavailable or confidence < 0.6
Backend input_hash caching prevents duplicate generation when data unchanged
Backend immutable versioning increments on each new generation
Backend RBAC enforced - only operator/admin roles can access narrative endpoints
Backend 404 correctly returned for non-existent incident IDs
Frontend IncidentNarrative component shows loading state while fetching
Frontend renders all narrative sections: title, summary, what_happened, contributing_factors, evidence, actions
Frontend shows confidence badge (green/blue/amber/red based on score)
Frontend shows model badge (GPT-5.2 for AI, Template for fallback)
Frontend View History shows version history with clickable version items
Frontend safety_note renders in yellow warning banner
Frontend Regenerate button allows re-generation of narrative
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing incidents (23b02397 TEST incident, d4ab6faf low_battery incident)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Incident Narrative Engine fully tested. TEST incident (23b02397) has a Template-generated narrative (40% confidence). low_battery incident (d4ab6faf) has an AI-generated narrative (78% confidence, GPT-5.2). The IncidentNarrative component renders in expanded incident rows on /operator/incidents page. Narrative loading takes 4-7 seconds due to API calls. Template narratives are generated when AI unavailable or confidence < 0.6. View History shows all narrative versions. RBAC enforced - guardian role gets 403.

ai_integration_verified.evidence: low_battery incident shows GPT-5.2 badge and 78% confidence
